name: dw-misc
description: Cross-cutting workflow helpers that don't fit dw-planning or dw-quality. Skills: dw-bootstrap (scaffold a repo for the dw-* loop), dw-git (all git ops by project conventions), dw-handoff (session handoff into .ai/handoffs/), dw-doctor (read-only env diagnostic), dw-setup-precommit (wire git pre-commit hooks via husky + lint-staged).
